title.index.description: Main title for the subsite management homepage

title.create.description: Title for the new subsite dialog

title.openNow.description: Title for the dialog asking if the user wants to redirect after successful creation

field.slug.description: Title for the subsite slug input field

field.origin.description: Domain column in the subsite list

field.createdAt.description: Column for the subsite creation time

field.actions.description: Column for actions in the subsite list

placeholder.slug.description: Placeholder for the slug input field

placeholder.title.message: Displayed in the subsite browser tab and site header
placeholder.title.description: Placeholder for the title input field

message.indexTip.message: Create independent brand subsites under the main site, each subsite can have its own logo, title, and feature set without needing to build separate source code.
message.indexTip.description: Description text for the subsite management homepage

message.empty.message: You haven't created any subsites yet. Click 'Create Subsite' in the top right to get started.

message.slugTip.message: 3-32 lowercase letters, numbers, or hyphens; cannot start or end with a hyphen, and cannot contain consecutive hyphens.

message.slugInvalid.message: Invalid subdomain prefix format, please check the rules and try again.

message.zoneMissing.message: The current main site is not configured with a subdomain zone, please contact the site administrator.

message.createFailed.message: Failed to create subsite, please try again later.

message.slugTaken.message: The subdomain {origin} is already taken. Please choose a different one.
message.slugTaken.description: Shown when the chosen slug collides with an existing subsite (backend returns code=duplication).

message.loadFailed.message: Failed to load the subsite list.
message.loadFailed.description: Failure message for loading the list

message.openNowConfirm.message: Subsite {origin} has been created. Would you like to open it now to continue configuration?
message.openNowConfirm.description: Prompt to open immediately after creation

title.domains.description: Title for the custom domain dialog

button.domains.description: Button to open the domain management dialog

button.bindDomain.description: Button to submit binding a new domain

button.verify.description: Check if the domain can be resolved and a certificate issued through our reverse proxy

button.refresh.description: Re-fetch the status of the domain

field.hostname.description: Input your owned domain or subdomain

placeholder.hostname.description: Placeholder for the hostname input field

message.domainsIntro.message: Bind your owned domain to this subsite. You need to be able to modify the DNS of that domain. Follow the prompts below to add a CNAME record and then click 'Verify Now', we will automatically issue and renew an HTTPS certificate for you for free through Let's Encrypt.

message.domainsEmpty.message: No custom domains bound yet. Fill in the complete domain in the form below and click 'Bind' to get started.

message.hostnameTip.message: Must be a public domain name that you can control the DNS for.

message.hostnameInvalid.message: Invalid domain format. Must be a publicly resolvable domain, IP addresses are not allowed.

message.domainCreated.message: Domain has been submitted, please follow the prompts to add a CNAME record.

message.domainCreateFailed.message: Failed to create domain, please try again later.

message.domainTaken.message: The domain {hostname} has already been added. Please use a different domain.
message.domainTaken.description: Shown when the chosen hostname is already bound to a site (backend returns code=duplication).

message.domainsLoadFailed.message: Failed to load the domain list.
message.domainsLoadFailed.description: Failure message for loading the domain list

message.domainActive.message: Domain is live! You can now access the substation via your custom HTTPS address.
message.domainActive.description: Indicates that the domain has entered the Active state

message.domainVerifyFailed.message: Verification failed, please check if the CNAME record points to our reverse proxy and DNS propagation is complete.

message.domainDeleteConfirm.message: Are you sure you want to unbind {hostname}? After unbinding, users will not be able to access your substation from this domain.

status.pending.description: Pending status label: waiting for user to add CNAME and click 'Verify Now'
